records.question: Which singers named Jacqueline Mars have a net worth of at least 17.8 million and have a song titled Left Outside Alone that sold exactly 275000 copies and reached a highest position of at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.singer_id = song.singer_id
WHERE singer.name = 'Jacqueline Mars' AND song.title = 'Left Outside Alone' AND song.sales = 275000.0 AND song.highest_position <= 3.0 AND singer.net_worth_millions >= 17.8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.Singer_ID
FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.Singer_ID = song.Singer_ID
WHERE singer.Name = 'Jacqueline Mars'
  AND singer.Net_Worth_Millions >= 17.8
  AND song.Title = 'Left Outside Alone'
  AND song.Sales = 275000
  AND song.Highest_Position <= 3

WHERE singer.net_worth_millions = 12.7 AND singer.citizenship = 'United States'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.Singer_ID
FROM singer
WHERE Net_Worth_Millions = 12.7 AND Citizenship = 'United States'

records.question: Which singers born in 1942 or later have a net worth of at least 17.4 million?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
WHERE singer.net_worth_millions >= 17.4 AND singer.birth_year >= 1942.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.Singer_ID
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year >= 1942 AND Net_Worth_Millions >= 17.4

records.question: Which singers named Christy Walton born in 1948 or later have a net worth of at least 28.8 million and have a song titled Yeah that sold at most 300000 copies and reached a highest position of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.singer_id = song.singer_id
WHERE singer.net_worth_millions >= 28.8 AND singer.birth_year >= 1948.0 AND song.sales <= 300000.0 AND song.title = 'Yeah' AND song.highest_position >= 1.0 AND singer.name = 'Christy Walton'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.Singer_ID
FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.Singer_ID = song.Singer_ID
WHERE singer.Name = 'Christy Walton'
  AND singer.Birth_Year >= 1948
  AND singer.Net_Worth_Millions >= 28.8
  AND song.Title = 'Yeah'
  AND song.Sales <= 300000
  AND song.Highest_Position >= 1

records.question: Which singers named Christy Walton have citizenship in United States?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
WHERE singer.citizenship = 'United States' AND singer.name = 'Christy Walton'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id
FROM singer
WHERE Name = 'Christy Walton' AND Citizenship = 'United States'

records.question: Which singers born in 1962 or later have German citizenship and a net worth of at most 14.3 million?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
WHERE singer.net_worth_millions <= 14.3 AND singer.citizenship = 'Germany' AND singer.birth_year >= 1962.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT singer.Singer_ID
FROM singer
WHERE Birth_Year >= 1962
  AND Citizenship = 'German'
  AND Net_Worth_Millions <= 14.3
